Name: m02_FogBank
Description: Determines the parameters for fog volumes.

Fields.Name: Fog Start Distance
Fields.Description: The start distance for the fog.

Fields.Name: Fog End Distance
Fields.Description: The end distance for the fog.

Fields.Name: Fog Strength
Fields.Description: The strength of the fog. 0 means it is not visible.

Fields.Name: Fog: R
Fields.Description: The red component of the RGBA color used for this fog.

Fields.Name: Fog: G
Fields.Description: The green component of the RGBA color used for this fog.

Fields.Name: Fog: B
Fields.Description: The blue component of the RGBA color used for this fog.

Fields.Name: Fog: Alpha
Fields.Description: The alpha component of the RGBA color used for this fog.
